steps.title: Find the release date
steps.content: The student wants to indicate when the board game was released. The relevant note is that Arkham Horror was released in 2005; details about the designer or source material do not answer the timing goal.

steps.title: Match the sentence to the goal
steps.content:
• Choice A: Identifies the designer, not the release date.
  • Choice B: States that the game was released in 2005.
  • Choice C: Describes the game's source material, not when it came out.
  • Choice D: Names Lovecraft's writing as the inspiration, not the release date.
The answer is B.
